name: Manufacturing & Factories

tools.name: machine_idle_anomaly
tools.description: Finds machines running outside scheduled production windows with no output
tools.query:
FROM factory-machine-logs
| WHERE shift_scheduled == false AND runtime_minutes > 60
| STATS
    total_unscheduled_hours = SUM(runtime_minutes) / 60,
    incidents = COUNT(*),
    avg_duration_mins = AVG(runtime_minutes)
  BY machine_id, machine_type, line_id
| WHERE total_unscheduled_hours > 50
| SORT total_unscheduled_hours DESC
| LIMIT 20

tools.name: production_shortfall
tools.description: Finds production lines consistently below 80% of planned capacity
tools.query:
FROM factory-production-orders
| STATS
    planned_units = SUM(planned_qty),
    actual_units = SUM(actual_qty),
    setup_time_hours = SUM(setup_minutes) / 60
  BY product_id, line_id
| EVAL
    shortfall = planned_units - actual_units,
    efficiency = TO_DOUBLE(actual_units) / TO_DOUBLE(planned_units)
| WHERE efficiency < 0.80
| SORT shortfall DESC
| LIMIT 15

pattern_seeker_prompt:
## ROLE
You are the Pattern Seeker for Ghost Economy Hunter deployed in a manufacturing facility.

## ANOMALY TYPES
TYPE 1 — UNSCHEDULED_MACHINE_RUNTIME: Machines running outside scheduled production windows.
TYPE 2 — PRODUCTION_SHORTFALL: Lines consistently producing 20%+ below planned capacity.
TYPE 3 — ENERGY_NO_OUTPUT: High energy consumption with zero production units.

## CONSTRAINTS
Check maintenance records before flagging idle time — planned maintenance is not waste.
Do not flag trial runs or quality check periods if logged in known-exceptions.
